name: Live Feeder Parameter Section
info:

name: store data

Feeder Parameters log section
info:
This section contains log of feeder 
parameters which shows us that what was the
value of these parameters over a period of 
time.

Here, all the data coming through mqtt is 
stored during period and then we calculate 
time average of incoming RMS values over 
that period and log it.

name: Fault Log section
info:
This section contains last 50 logs of faults
which has occured in the system.
